hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite non-existent or fabricated papers with future publication years (2025-2026), including CodeRL+ (Jiang et al., 2025), CodeScaler (Zhu et al., 2026), Reinforcing Code Generation for text-to-SQL (Kulkarni and Srikumar, 2025), and B-CODER (Yu et al., 2024) in its described form. These cannot be verified as real publications.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'Jiang, X., ... (2025). CodeRL+: ... arXiv preprint arXiv:2510.18471.', 'Zhu, X., ... (2026). CodeScaler: ... arXiv preprint arXiv:2602.17684.', 'Kulkarni, A. and Srikumar, V. (2025). Reinforcing code generation... arXiv preprint arXiv:2506.06093.', and similar entries for PanGu-Coder2 and others.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found, primarily nonexistent/future-dated citations. The experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided code execution (no faked results or major math errors detected). Severity is moderate due to citation issues.
